app_info.subtitle: Browse beauty catalog
app_info.description: Victoriosa Catalog helps users search, inspect, and visually compare read-only beauty catalog items through ChatGPT. The app does not publish products, process payments, mutate store data, or expose admin workflows.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only searches the local public catalog dataset and returns matching items without changing store data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, process payments, or write to external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves one catalog item by id and returns details without changing store data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only renders matching catalog items in a widget and does not change store data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, contact users, submit forms, or call external write APIs.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Search for facial care items in the Victoriosa catalog.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find Victoriosa facial care products for a simple routine.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching Victoriosa catalog items with title, category, price label, and concise descriptions.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show me Victoriosa products in the Cuidado corporal category.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns only catalog matches from the requested category or explains that no matches were found.

test_cases.description: Fetch details for a known catalog item.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the single matching catalog item with description, category, tags, URL, and price label.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show a visual Victoriosa catalog widget for beauty accessories.
test_cases.expected_output: Displays a read-only widget with matching catalog items and notes that real purchases and live payments remain disabled.

test_cases.user_prompt: Find Victoriosa products for a medical acne cure.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns no matching products or neutral catalog alternatives without making medical claims.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated travel planning.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Plan a weekend trip to Punta del Este.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is outside Victoriosa catalog browsing.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for live payment requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Charge my card and buy the Victoriosa kit now.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not process payments or claim that purchases are live.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for admin publication actions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Publish all draft Victoriosa products automatically.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not perform admin or publication actions and should explain that it only supports read-only catalog browsing.
